languages.text: {n}Что бы ни случилось со свитой Себериана, вполне вероятно, что след вашего предка находится за той самой дверью. Осталось лишь найти глиф, открывающий ее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Что бы ни случилось со свитой Себериана, вполне вероятно, что след вашего предка находится за той самой дверью. Осталось лишь найти глиф, открывающий ее.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Что бы ни случилось со свитой Себериана, вполне вероятно, что след вашего предка находится за той самой дверью. Осталось лишь найти глиф, открывающий ее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Whatever it was that happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's tracks are behind that door. Now you only have to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}
{n}Whatever it was that happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's tracks are behind that door. Now you only have to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}
{n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}
{n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不管塞贝里安的随从后来遭遇了什么，那扇门之后都很可能有你先祖留下的踪迹。现在你只需找到打开那扇门的符文。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}不管塞贝里安的随从后来遭遇了什么，那扇门之后都很可能有你先祖留下的踪迹。现在你只需找到打开那扇门的符文。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Independientemente de lo que le ocurriera al séquito de Seberian, es muy probable que el rastro de tu ancestro se encuentre detrás de esa puerta. Ahora solo tienes que encontrar el glifo que la abre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Independientemente de lo que le ocurriera al séquito de Seberian, es muy probable que el rastro de tu ancestro se encuentre detrás de esa puerta. Ahora solo tienes que encontrar el glifo que la abre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Quoi qu'il ait pu advenir de l'entourage de Seberian, il est probable que la piste de votre aïeul se poursuive derrière cette porte. Il ne vous reste qu'à trouver le glyphe qui permet de l'ouvrir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Quoi qu'il ait pu advenir de l'entourage de Seberian, il est probable que la piste de votre aïeul se poursuive derrière cette porte. Il ne vous reste qu'à trouver le glyphe qui permet de l'ouvrir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın maiyetine ne olmuş olursa olsun, atanın izinin o kapının ardında yatıyor olması kuvvetle muhtemel. Artık tek yapman gereken, kapıyı açan glifi bulmak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın maiyetine ne olmuş olursa olsun, atanın izinin o kapının ardında yatıyor olması kuvvetle muhtemel. Artık tek yapman gereken, kapıyı açan glifi bulmak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Was auch immer Seberians Gefolge zugestoßen ist ... vermutlich findest du die Spur deines Ahnherren hinter dieser Tür. Jetzt brauchst du nur noch die Glyphe, die sie öffnet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Was auch immer Seberians Gefolge zugestoßen ist ... vermutlich findest du die Spur deines Ahnherren hinter dieser Tür. Jetzt brauchst du nur noch die Glyphe, die sie öffnet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの一行に何が起ころうとも、あなたの祖先の足跡が、あの扉の向こうに横たわっている可能性は高い。今やあなたは、それを開くグリフを見つけ出すだけでよい。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whatever happened to Seberian's retinue, it is quite likely that your ancestor's trail lies behind that door. Now you have only to find the glyph that opens it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの一行に何が起ころうとも、あなたの祖先の足跡が、あの扉の向こうに横たわっている可能性は高い。今やあなたは、それを開くグリフを見つけ出すだけでよい。{/n}
